info.description: Welcome to the API design for Invoices at ACC. This API specification has been created to socialise API design with the sector and seek feedback for further refinement. Unplanned API routes have also been specified at a high level, to identify appetite for additional features. The ACC Claims API design principals are based on government standards and guidelines https://www.ict.govt.nz/guidance-and-resources/standards-compliance/api-standard-and-guidelines
info.title: ACC Invoice API

post.summary: Create a new Invoice for the specified Vendor.
post.description: Creates a new Invoice for the specified Vendor if the user is authorised to create invoices for the Vendor.

get.summary: Returns the details of the specified invoice.
get.description: Returns the details of the specified invoice.

get.summary: Returns a summary of Invoices for the specified Vendor.
get.description: Returns the details of Invoices for the specified Vendor if the user is authorised to view the Vendors Invoices.

get.summary: Get a list of Payments for the specified Vendor.
get.description: Returns a list of payments for the specified Vendor if the user is authorised to view the Vendors Payments.

get.summary: Get the Payment details for the specified Vendor and Payment reference.
get.description: Returns the summary of a Payment for the specified Vendor and Payment reference if the user is authorised to view the Vendor Payment.

get.summary: Get the Payment summary for the specified Vendor and Payment reference.
get.description: Returns the summary of a Payment for the specified Vendor and Payment reference if the user is authorised to view the Vendor Payment.

get.summary: Get the List of a submitted Vendor Invoices.
get.description: Returns a list of submitted Vendor Invoices if the user is authorised to view the Vendor Invoice.

hoursClaimed.description: Only required when billingMethod is 'time'. For a date range, use separate line items.

minutesClaimed.description: Only required when billingMethod is 'time'. Value 0-59; hours or minutes (or both) must be greater than 0.

travelClaimed.description: Only required when billingMethod is 'distance'. Whole kilometres from 1 to 100,000.

unitsClaimed.description: Only required when billingMethod is 'units' (flat fee). Normally a whole number, 2 decimal places allowed.

declarationDate.description: The date the invoice is submitted.

invoiceId.description: The schedule (invoice) number must be unique for the vendor ID.  It must start with a digit or a letter (but not ‘W’).  Each remaining character, up to 10 in all, can be a letter, digit, space, hyphen, or underscore.

lines.description: The ACC contract ID for the service

contractId.description: The ACC contract ID (if there is one) for the service or services.

serviceCodes.description: Enter 1-5 ACC service codes, valid for the given contract ID if there is one.

purchaseOrderNumber.description: Enter the purchase order number if relevant (6 or 7 digits).

invoiceComment.description: Enter any extra details needed, such as tooth numbers for dental services.

invoiceAmount.description: Amount claimed for this service line.

claimId.description: The ACC45 claim number. Letters and numbers only, 1-12 characters.

facilityId.description: ID of the facility where the service was provided; needed for some contracts such as elective surgery.

vendorGST.description: GST number, if the vendor is registered for GST.
